form.formComment: Lines up again after a break of 14 months. Well beaten at the end of his last preparation when eleventh unwanted in the market behind Micton Mouse. Has only trialled once and might be short on fitness.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Lines up again after a break of 14 months. Well beaten at the end of his last preparation when eleventh unwanted in the market behind Micton Mouse. Has only trialled once and might be short on fitness.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced on the first turn. Tired to be beaten 53m.
Caught wide before being restrained to the rear of the field.
Locked wheels with Onecrowdedhour near the 300m.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr3) over 2150m at Bendigo was 8th-12.27 at the bell, beaten 12 m by Miss Piggy Wiggy (2:39.40) in NR up to 45 on April 8 at $26. At the start before 5th (Fr3) over 2240m at Swan Hill beaten 22 m by Ozzie Pearl (2:45.60) in 0-1 WIN on March 31 at $23. This looks a more suitable assignment.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 8th (Fr3) over 2150m at Bendigo was 8th-12.27 at the bell, beaten 12 m by Miss Piggy Wiggy (2:39.40) in NR up to 45 on April 8 at $26. At the start before 5th (Fr3) over 2240m at Swan Hill beaten 22 m by Ozzie Pearl (2:45.60) in 0-1 WIN on March 31 at $23. This looks a more suitable assignment.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 2 m fifth behind Miss Piggy Wiggy at Bendigo over 2150m NR up to 45 last start. Before that was beaten 4 metres third at Kilmore over 2180m in NR 36 to 40 on April 2. Expected to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 2 m fifth behind Miss Piggy Wiggy at Bendigo over 2150m NR up to 45 last start. Before that was beaten 4 metres third at Kilmore over 2180m in NR 36 to 40 on April 2. Expected to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped during the score up and was out of position as the start was effected.
Hung in and contacted marker pegs before using the sprint lane.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. At the latest first-up run 7th (Sr1) over 1690m at this track beaten 35 m by Iamawingate (2:03.30) in NR 40 to 45 on October 7 at $41. Will be better for this run and happy to watch this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from the paddock. At the latest first-up run 7th (Sr1) over 1690m at this track beaten 35 m by Iamawingate (2:03.30) in NR 40 to 45 on October 7 at $41. Will be better for this run and happy to watch this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung out shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Finished 2.75 m fourth behind Kimchi at Echuca over 1755m NR 38 to 44 last start. Before that was beaten 2.25 metres second at Kilmore over 1690m in NR up to 42 M on April 2. Right in this contest.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished 2.75 m fourth behind Kimchi at Echuca over 1755m NR 38 to 44 last start. Before that was beaten 2.25 metres second at Kilmore over 1690m in NR up to 42 M on April 2. Right in this contest.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped in the score up. Tired to be beaten 66.1m into tenth and last placing.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr5) over 1690m at Kilmore was 4th-7.39 at the bell, beaten 5 m by Hurricane Hooly (2:05.70) in NR up to 42 M on April 2 at $15. At the start before 10th (Sr1) over 1650m at Bendigo beaten 8 m by Fake Cullection (1:59.30) in NR up to 40 on March 25 at $23. Deserves another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr5) over 1690m at Kilmore was 4th-7.39 at the bell, beaten 5 m by Hurricane Hooly (2:05.70) in NR up to 42 M on April 2 at $15. At the start before 10th (Sr1) over 1650m at Bendigo beaten 8 m by Fake Cullection (1:59.30) in NR up to 40 on March 25 at $23. Deserves another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in and contacted marker pegs approaching the 200m mark.
Inconvenienced over the concluding stages when Kardesler shifted outward.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 2nd (Fr5) over 1755m after showing early speed at Echuca, beaten a nose by Kimchi (2:09.90) in NR 38 to 44 on April 5 at $8.50. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 2nd (Fr5) over 1755m after showing early speed at Echuca, beaten a nose by Kimchi (2:09.90) in NR 38 to 44 on April 5 at $8.50. Leading player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced roughly upon entering the first turn.
Dropped her near fore shin boot causing her to break near the 200m.
Galloped clear of interference near the 300m.

form.formComment: Last start 7th (Sr1) over 1755m at Echuca, beaten 9 m by Kimchi (2:09.90) in NR 38 to 44 on April 5 at $101. Before that, 9th (Fr1) over 1690m at this track, beaten 30 m by Major Maurie (2:03.10) in NR 41 to 44 on March 17 at $101. Has the same draw and is worth another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 7th (Sr1) over 1755m at Echuca, beaten 9 m by Kimchi (2:09.90) in NR 38 to 44 on April 5 at $101. Before that, 9th (Fr1) over 1690m at this track, beaten 30 m by Major Maurie (2:03.10) in NR 41 to 44 on March 17 at $101. Has the same draw and is worth another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tired to be beaten 54m into 6th placing.
Tired to be beaten 57.3m into tenth placing.

form.formComment: Last start ran on from midfield and posted a big 5 m win (Sr1) at Kilmore (2:07.80) beating Archaa in NR up to 35 on April 2 at $5.50 at the bell was 4th-4.23. Big chance of back-to-back wins.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start ran on from midfield and posted a big 5 m win (Sr1) at Kilmore (2:07.80) beating Archaa in NR up to 35 on April 2 at $5.50 at the bell was 4th-4.23. Big chance of back-to-back wins.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in and contacted pegs entering the home straight on the final occasion.
Checked and galloped near the 300m when Alcatraz Girl galloped.
